    Methods in neqsim.process.chemistry that return ProductionChemical
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ProductionChemical
    ProductionChemical.acid(String name, double activeWtPct)
    Creates a mineral acid for stimulation / cleaning (HCl by default).
    static ProductionChemical
    ProductionChemical.corrosionInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
    Creates an imidazoline-based corrosion inhibitor with default properties.
    static ProductionChemical
    ProductionChemical.h2sScavenger(String name, double dosagePpm)
    Creates a triazine-based H2S scavenger.
    static ProductionChemical
    ProductionChemical.scaleInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
    Creates a phosphonate-based scale inhibitor with default properties.
    static ProductionChemical
    ProductionChemical.thermodynamicHydrateInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
    Creates a thermodynamic hydrate inhibitor (MEG by default).

    Method
    Description
    void
    ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.addChemical(ProductionChemical chemical)
    Adds a chemical to the study.

    ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.addIssue(ProductionChemical a, ProductionChemical b, String category, String mechanism, String mitigation, ChemicalInteractionRule.Severity severity)
    Records an issue and bumps the highest severity.
    boolean
    ChemicalInteractionRule.matches(ProductionChemical a, ProductionChemical b)
    Tests whether this rule matches the ordered pair of chemicals (a, b).
    private static boolean
    ChemicalInteractionRule.matchOperand(String typeSpec, String ingredientSpec, ProductionChemical c)
    Tests whether a chemical matches an operand (type and ingredient with wildcard support).
